_publications._publicationTitle: A role for the p53 pathway in the pathology of meningiomas with NF2 loss.

_contextSnippet: LOH of the NF2 locus was seen with an incidence of 52.1% in the cohort, similar to previously reported values.
details: Used as microsatellite marker for detecting NF2 LOH, which was found in 52.1% of meningioma cohort
